name: Sammy Davis, Sr.
abstract: Samuel George Davis Sr. (December 12, 1900 – May 21, 1988) was an American dancer and the father of entertainer Sammy Davis Jr.

concerts.label: Benefit: Al Jolson Nation-Wide Servicemen's Free Canteen

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Coleman
about_quotes.evidence: His uncle Will Mast/en, and his father, Sammy Davis Senior, were the members of the trio. Sammy used to call me BeBop, but I certainly wasn't playing that style.

about_quotes.speaker: Horace Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: So they took Sammy Davis, Sr. to play in The Benny Goodman Story, instead of me.
